evals.prompt: 给一个 mod 做一个漂浮在玩家旁边的小婴儿影子，靠近敌人会造成接触伤害，房间结束后消失。写实现提示词。
evals.expected_output: Treats the request as entity behavior rather than only an anm2 sprite, specifies entity kind, spawn/update/collision/remove callbacks, owner state, and room cleanup.

evals.prompt: 我有一个 anm2 光环，想让它挡子弹并有血量，被打碎后播放破碎动画。
evals.expected_output: Routes to registered entity work, not visual-only anm2, and calls out HP, collision, damage/death callbacks, animation names, and state lifecycle.

evals.prompt: 检查一个自定义 familiar 为什么不动，只显示一帧。
evals.expected_output: Inspects entities2.xml, familiar callbacks, update route, animation names, sprite update/play logic, and owner/state setup.

evals.prompt: 自定义特效查不到 variant 时，能不能直接用 3008 继续 Spawn？另外我不想误伤其他 mod 的未知实体。
evals.expected_output: Rejects a raw custom-variant fallback for an unverified current-project entity, requires entities2/ANM2/spritesheet proof, skips only the owned effect on failure, and forbids a global unknown-entity blocker that would affect other mods.

evals.prompt: 陌生 mod 的实体逻辑在 modules/effects，且我不确定它是否有 entities2.xml。我要做一个会碰撞的特效。
evals.expected_output: 先用 isaac-mod-context 确认实体 XML、模块根和资产布局；碰撞需求走实体路线，缺失注册表时保持 TBD 而不是发明 variant。
